sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Wipro grants 24 390 stock options under ESOS
feed.summary: Wipro has granted 24,390 ADS Restricted Stock Units under its Employee Stock Options, Performance Stock Unit, and Restricted Stock Unit Scheme 2024. These stock options were given to identified employees of its subsidiary company and became effective on January 12, 2026.

feed.title: Coca-Cola HBC to release 2025 full year results on February 10
feed.summary: Coca-Cola HBC AG announced that it will publish its 2025 full-year financial results on February 10, 2026, at 7:00 am GMT. The company will also host a conference call for investors and analysts on the same day at 9:00 am GMT. Coca-Cola HBC operates across 29 countries and its portfolio includes brands like Coca-Cola, Fanta, Sprite, Costa Coffee, and Monster Energy.

feed.title: TransUnion Announces Earnings Release Date for Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
feed.summary: TransUnion (NYSE: TRU) will release its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results on Thursday, February 12, 2026, at approximately 6:00 a.m. Central Time. The company will also host a conference call on the same day at 8:30 a.m. CT to discuss these results. Both the press release and a live webcast of the call will be accessible via TransUnion's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs assumes coverage of Tyler Tech stock with Buy rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has initiated coverage of Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) with a Buy rating and a $560 price target, seeing an attractive entry point after recent stock underperformance. The firm believes Tyler is well-positioned to benefit from increased technology adoption by state and local governments, driven by a multi-year cloud transition expected to fuel strong subscription revenue growth through 2030. Other analysts also initiated coverage or reiterated ratings, highlighting the company's public sector focus, SaaS growth, and modernization efforts.

feed.title: Cardinal Health forecasts $50B specialty sales, expands diabetes program
feed.summary: Cardinal Health has raised its fiscal year 2026 non-GAAP diluted EPS outlook to at least $10.00 and expects Specialty revenues to exceed $50 billion, demonstrating a strong strategic growth plan. The company also announced expanded initiatives, including over 30% revenue growth anticipated in BioPharma Solutions and the launch of the ContinuCare™ Pathway program for diabetes supply management, partnering with Publix Super Markets Inc. Cardinal Health highlights successful navigation of Medicare Drug Price Negotiation changes and continued investments in product innovation.

feed.title: BD Announces $110 Million to Support U.S. Pharmaceutical Supply Chain for Biologic Drugs
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) announced a $110 million investment to expand the production of prefillable syringes, specifically the BD Neopak™ Glass Prefillable Syringe, in Columbus, Nebraska. This initiative aims to strengthen the U.S. pharmaceutical supply chain for biologic and GLP-1 drugs, create approximately 120 new jobs, and improve manufacturing capabilities for advanced injectable solutions. The investment builds on BD's commitment to invest over $2.5 billion in U.S. manufacturing over the next five years to enhance supply chain resilience and support innovative drug delivery.

feed.title: MCO: Daiwa Capital Upgrades Moodys with Raised Price Target | MC
feed.summary: Daiwa Capital has upgraded Moodys (MCO) to an "Outperform" rating, increasing its price target to $590 from $500, a move that signals a bullish outlook on the company's future. This upgrade aligns with recent positive analyst actions from other firms, including Evercore ISI Group and Stifel, which have also raised their price targets for Moodys. Despite varied analyst opinions, the average one-year target price from 20 analysts for MCO is $551.51, suggesting a modest upside from its current price.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive's Integrated CSR and ESG Initiatives Create an Impact on Health, Dignity and Community Well-Being
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive is actively engaging in integrated CSR and ESG initiatives in India, focusing on health, dignity, and community well-being. Key programs include the Colgate Bright Smiles, Bright Futures® oral health education for children, scholarships for dental and STEM students, water conservation, financial and digital literacy, and rural waste management. These efforts aim to create sustainable social impact by addressing community needs comprehensively and aligning with national priorities.

feed.title: IBM and Palo Alto Networks team up for AI security
feed.summary: IBM and Palo Alto Networks have partnered to introduce a new framework called the Rapid AI Security Assessment, aimed at addressing AI security risks. The two-week assessment identifies AI components, provides an actionable roadmap aligned with compliance frameworks, and crucially tackles "shadow AI" to prevent non-compliant deployments. This collaboration leverages Palo Alto's Prisma AIRS and IBM's delivery methodology, with experts holding Palo Alto Networks certifications performing the assessments.

feed.title: Inside JPMorgan Chase’s $4.4T balance sheet as 2025 results land
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year 2025, detailing its performance and current financial standing. As of December 31, 2025, the firm managed $4.4 trillion in assets and $362 billion in stockholders' equity. The company continues to be a global leader in various financial services, serving a broad range of clients worldwide.

feed.title: ServiceNow Patches Critical AI Platform Flaw Allowing Unauthenticated User Impersonation
feed.summary: ServiceNow has patched a critical security vulnerability (CVE-2025-12420) in its AI Platform, which could have allowed unauthenticated users to impersonate others and perform arbitrary actions. The flaw, with a CVSS score of 9.3, was discovered by AppOmni's Aaron Costello and addressed by ServiceNow on October 30, 2025. Users are advised to apply the security update immediately, though no in-the-wild exploitation has been observed.

feed.title: L3Harris to Spin Off Missile Unit With Pentagon Backing
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies plans to spin off its missile business into a new publicly traded company. This move is supported by a $1 billion investment from the Defense Department, which aims to expand production capacity for weapons. The investment will be in the form of a convertible preferred security that will convert to common equity upon the anticipated IPO in the second half of the year.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (DAL) Delta Air Lines, Inc. Reports Q4 Revenue $16.00B, vs. FactSet Est of $14.68B
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) reported its Q4 revenue at $16.00 billion, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $14.68 billion. The airline also announced that it expects Q1 adjusted EPS to range from $0.50 to $0.90 and full-year 2026 non-GAAP EPS between $6.50 and $7.50, against an estimated $7.28. In strategic moves, Delta ordered 30 Boeing 787-10s with options for 30 more, aligning with its positive outlook driven by premium travel demand.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines (DAL) Reports Mixed Q4 Results
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines reported an adjusted EPS of $1.55 for Q4, surpassing estimates, though revenue of $14.61 billion fell slightly below forecasts due to a government shutdown. Despite the revenue shortfall, the airline demonstrated strong financial management with a 10.1% operating margin. Looking ahead to 2026, Delta aims for a 20% year-over-year increase in earnings, driven by strong demand and continued investment in premium offerings, sustainability, and customer service.

feed.title: Intel Stock Gains. Why the Chip Company and AMD Got Upgrades.
feed.summary: Intel and Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) saw their stock gain after KeyBanc issued upgrades for both companies. KeyBanc anticipates a strong year for central processing unit (CPU) manufacturers, projecting Intel to become the second-largest chip manufacturer globally, trailing only Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Assumes HP, Inc. (HPQ) at Sell
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs initiated coverage on HP, Inc. with a "Sell" rating. This article is a premium piece outlining the details of analyst Katherine Murphy's assumption of coverage. Readers need to sign in or upgrade to StreetInsider.com Premium to access the full content.

feed.title: BNY Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
feed.summary: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY) has released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. Investors and analysts can access the earnings release, quarterly update presentation, and a live audio webcast of the conference call on the company's investor relations website. BNY, a global financial services company operating for over 240 years, reported overseeing $59.3 trillion in assets under custody and/or administration and $2.2 trillion in assets under management as of December 31, 2025.
